prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Z30DT** 3.0L V6 CDTI (Y30DT for earlier models) with a **Garrett GTB2260VK** turbocharger, upgraded to 1.5 bar boost via a **Pierburg CWA100** water-methanol injection system, paired with a **Bosch CP3 high-pressure fuel pump** and **Siemens 60mm throttle body** for 380hp and 650Nm torque

Full **3.0L V6 CDTI (Z30DT) forged internals** build: **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83mm, 10.5:1 CR)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, **ACL Race Series bearings**, and **ARP head studs**, with a **custom 280° camshaft from Schrick** for optimized airflow

Chassis-specific **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** with **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** and **polyurethane bushings from Powerflex (Black Series)**, paired with a **Whiteline front sway bar (24mm)** and **rear subframe reinforcement plates from Irmscher** to handle increased torque
estetica: **Irmscher Signum-specific widebody kit** (front/rear fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with **custom carbon fiber hood (30% weight reduction)** from **Seibon**, featuring a **functional central NACA duct** for intercooler airflow

**OMP Signum-specific bolt-on rear wing** (adjustable angle, 3D-printed carbon fiber) with **integrated LED brake light**, paired with **Hella Rallye 3000 headlights (DE projector, 55W HID)** and **custom smoked taillights with sequential turn signals**

**BBS CH-R 9x19 ET35 (front) and 10x19 ET40 (rear) forged wheels** in **Gunmetal finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 (245/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear)**, with **AP Racing 355mm front brake kit (6-piston calipers, two-piece rotors)** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**
